name: elegy-memory
description: Governed skill definition for the shipped Elegy-memory MVP CLI surface: bounded local add, search, list, inspect, purge, health, export, contradiction review, and preview re-embed flows without claiming downstream runtime policy authority.

metadata.summary: Bounded local non-authoritative memory operations over the current Elegy-memory MVP CLI surface, including preview re-embed visibility.

triggers.description: When work involves Elegy's current bounded local memory operator surface.
When work should use the dedicated Elegy-memory MVP CLI instead of older artifact-management language.
When local memories need to be added, searched, listed, or inspected within a scope.
When the local memory store needs health reporting, export, or purge handling.
When contradiction review or preview re-embed status should be checked for the local memory store.

constraints.description: This surface is limited to the shipped MVP CLI commands add, search, list, inspect, purge, health, export, contradictions, and preview re-embed handling.
This surface must not claim currentness, approval, freshness, retrieval ranking, runtime validation, or promotion authority.
The visible re-embed command remains a preview surface and must not be described as a fully wired provider-backed embedding workflow.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: One of add, search, list, inspect, purge, health, export, reembed, or contradictions.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path. Defaults to ~/.elegy/memory.db.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Optional memory scope. Supported values: session, workspace, user, or agent. Defaults to workspace.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Memory content for the add command.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query for the search command.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Memory identifier for the inspect command.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Optional explicit export destination for the export command.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Optional provider name for the preview re-embed command.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Optional limit for search, list, or preview re-embed operations.

parameters.name: includeDormant
parameters.description: Optional search flag to include dormant records.

parameters.name: memoryType
parameters.description: Optional memory type for add or list. Supported values: fact, preference, decision, procedure, or observation.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Optional state filter for list. Supported values: active, dormant, or deleted.

parameters.name: importance
parameters.description: Optional importance value for add. Defaults to 0.5.

parameters.name: provenance
parameters.description: Optional provenance for add. Supported values: user-stated, agent-observed, consolidated, imported, or agent-inferred.

parameters.name: yes
parameters.description: Optional purge flag to skip confirmation.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Optional global output format. Supported values: text or json.

output.description: Command-scoped add, search, list, inspect, purge, health, export, contradiction, and preview re-embed reports for the local non-authoritative memory surface.
